message:
test(ws_bridge): add 39 edge-case tests for WebSocket-PTY bridge (bd-104xs)

Cover WsPtyBridgeConfig defaults/clone/debug, BridgeSummary as_json
with/without signal/clone/eq/debug, ControlMessage close/debug/clone/eq,
parse_control_message invalid JSON/missing type/missing cols/rows/
zero dims/u16 overflow/large values, read_u16_field valid/missing/
non-numeric/overflow, query_param empty/missing-value/duplicates/
value-with-equals, validate_upgrade_request no restrictions/missing
origin/missing query/missing token param/correct token,
HandshakeRejection into_response/debug/clone/eq, Counters default/debug,
make_session_id format/uniqueness, now_iso8601 format,
TelemetrySink no-path noop and with-path JSONL output.

46 total tests (7 existing + 39 new).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
